title: 2200-nen Neko no Kuni Nippon
titleNative: 2200年ねこの国ニッポン
synonyms: Japan, the Land of Cats in the Year 2200
synopsis: Takes place in the year 2200, where Japan has become a land of cats as the human population's birth rate has declined. In this future world, cats can talk, learn, and work. The story follows a high school girl and her argumentative cat. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: #Zombie Sagashitemasu
titleNative: #ゾンビさがしてます
synopsis: The manga is set in a world where 90 percent of humans on Earth have contracted and died from a deadly, virulent disease; only to then rise again as zombies who only attack people. 13 years after that "Red Day" of societal and civilizational collapse, the surviving humans survive away from the big cities, while still hoping to retake them someday. An entirely new generation of people who know nothing of the pre-Red Day world are now coming into their own. The story begins when Aki and her close friends Haru and Natsuki begin a journey to find Aki's missing father. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Fuun Kara no Saikyou Otoko
titleNative: 不運からの最強男
synonyms: The Strongest Man, Born From Misfortune
synopsis: "Fortune and Misfortune are two sides of the same coin?! Reverse any adversary and cease redemption!!" Siegbert is reborn after an unfortunate accident in his previous life. His new family is warm and welcoming... so much so it seems as though he may no longer be an unlucky person. In this world, he can finally live a quiet, peaceful life... or so he thought. It seems that he actually holds an insanely high luck stat in this new world...? "Every chance is a manifestation of good fortune. If you can cease the chances, your wishes shall be granted..." Conquering each "chance" granted by his good fortune, will he now cease redemption on the generational legacy this family has yet to fulfill?! (Source: MangaPlaza)

title: Kanagawa Elves
titleNative: #神奈川に住んでるエルフ
synopsis: 2 years ago, the elves who lived in the hidden forest lost their homes due to a forest fire, now they are living in the Kanagawa Prefecture. This story however focuses on a human who becomes the roommate of an elf living in an apartment. (Source: MU)

titleNative: 忍者ハットリくん＋パーマン 忍者怪獣ジッポウVSミラクル卵
synopsis: Crossover film featuring both of Motoo Abiko's work. Both casts gets wrapped up when an alien egg falls from the sky that becomes a monster seeking destruction of the Earth. It was screened as a double feature with Doraemon: Nobita no Little Star Wars.

title: Ninja Hattori-kun + Perman: Chounouryoku Wars
titleNative: 忍者ハットリくん＋パーマン 超能力ウォーズ
synonyms: Ninja Hattori-kun Plus Perman: Chounouryoku Wars
synopsis: Crossover film featuring both of Motoo Abiko's work. Both casts gets wrapped up in an ESP war helping a psychic girl named Yuri whose homeland was destroyed by an evil psychic man who is trying to capture all the psychics in the world and use them for world domination. It was screened as a double feature with Doraemon: Nobita no Makai Daibouken.

title: Shuukan Ranobe Anime
titleNative: 週刊ラノベアニメ
synonyms: Shoushin Time Leap (傷心タイムリープ)
Femme Fatale Ikusei Keikaku (ファムファタル育成計画)
Marie Antoinette ni Tensei Shita node, Zenryoku de Guillotine wo Kaihi Shimasu (マリー・アントワネットに転生したので全力でギロチンを回避します)
synopsis: A collection of original short episodes based on stories created by light novel authors and illustrators. Includes: • Shoushin Time Leap On her final Christmas in high school, Miri confesses to her classmate Takashi, but he rejects her. In her despair, she clings to a past diary. The diary envelops her in light, and Miri finds herself transported six months in the past. She uses this chance, and repeated time leaps, to try to change her future, and find out the reason why Takashi rejected her confession. • Femme Fatale Ikusei Keikaku Hiroki is a high school student who is well liked and chubby. After his cute cousin Tsukino is dumped by her ex-boyfriend, Hiroki decides, "I'll become a beautiful woman and make him fall in love with me, and then dump him!" He recruits friends and allies to help him go on a diet and transform into a femme fatale and avenge his cousin. • Jack the Reaper A man wakes up one day in an interrogation room, with no memory of who he is and why he's there. Before

title: Hokuto no Ken: Kenou-gun Zako-tachi no Banka
titleRomaji: Hokuto no Ken: Kenou-gun Zako-tachi no Banka
titleNative: 北斗の拳 拳王軍ザコたちの挽歌
synopsis: A young man named Nobu, who is looking for a job in the post-apocalyptic world, ends up tricked into joining Raoh's Army.

title: Tefuda ga Oume no Victoria
titleNative: 手札が多めのビクトリア
synopsis: In an age when spies act behind the scenes in every land, Chloe spends her days successfully carrying out even the most difficult missions due to her unparalleled disguise skills and martial arts abilities. After the betrayal of her boss, she suddenly disappears—as Chloe plans to redo her life as the ordinary citizen Victoria in the neighboring kingdom of Ashberry, striving for a “normal” life. However, Victoria's peaceful life is abruptly cut short as she begins to get involved with many people. In this new land, her experiences and abilities from her days as a spy come in far more useful than she ever expected! On the other hand, the second prince--and others--take an interest in Victoria's strength, and the shadows close in on the woman with many faces… (Source: Yen Press)

title: Martial Conqueror of the Cosmos
titleNative: 武碎星河
synopsis: Seeking his parents, the mountain youth Jiang Han embarks on a journey of cultivation. He accidentally activates the Celestial Beast Cauldron, a legacy left by his mother, and awakens supreme magical powers! From then on, he defies fate and changes his destiny! He battles heaven and earth! On the battlefield where the gods fell, he fights bloody battles against countless races, carving a path to the heavens with his mortal body! He vows to fight for a bright future for humanity! (Source: iQIYI, translated)

title: Zui Qiang Shengji
titleNative: 最强升级
synopsis: Zhao Fang brought the game system to another world and found himself a useless young master with no martial arts skills, and only a maid by his side. Faced with difficulties, Zhao Fang felt that it was time to show himself. Zhao Fang, who has extensive game experience, successfully found the system BUG, ​​worked hard to level up, went through hardships, entered countless secret realms, and completed various tasks arranged by the system. (Source: Tencent, Google translated)

title: Douluo Dalu Movie: Jiandao Chen Xin
titleRomaji: Douluo Dalu Movie: Jiandao Chen Xin
titleNative: 斗罗大陆剧场版 剑道尘心
synopsis: Twenty years before the final Douluo battle, the Spirit Hall had conspired to unify the entire spirit master world and annex all the sects. The Seven Treasures Glazed Tile Sect was the first to be hit and fell into danger. Bone Douluo brought the sect's young master, the five-year-old Ning Rongrong, to ask Sword Douluo to rescue them. So Sword Douluo Chenxin took little Rongrong on a life-and-death escape. However, what they didn't know was that behind this road was a huge conspiracy that would affect Douluo Continent... (Source: Tencent, Google translated)

tags.name: Full CGI
tags.description: Almost entirely created with computer-generated imagery.

title: Ye De Ming Ming Shu
titleNative: 夜的命名术
synopsis: After a difficult upbringing, Qingchen's life takes a drastic turn when a mysterious countdown emerges on his arm. He is taken to Prison No. 18, a dangerous parallel universe, when it reaches zero. He overcomes severe adversity and gains the respect of the demigod Li Shutong by using his cunning and bravery. He then becomes his disciple and embarks on a journey of genuine transformation.
